summary: Call to undefined function _substitute_plugin_root() will cause NameError at runtime
details: The code calls _substitute_plugin_root(servers, abs_root, logger) but this function is never defined in the diff. This will cause a NameError at runtime when processing any plugin with LSP servers, completely breaking the LSP feature for plugins using the ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} placeholder pattern. Security impact: if function is absent, placeholder substitution is skipped and paths may be wrong, but the primary impact is a correctness BLOCKER rather than a security issue per se.
